feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: At Destiny's Hand
entry.summary:
Author: theletters

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,666Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Arthur frowned. "Are you trying to get rid of me?" Merlin coughed to hide a laugh; it was surprisingly astute of Arthur to have noticed. "Not at all," Geoffrey said quickly, glowering at Merlin—and then, a gleam came over his eye, and he appraised Merlin with renewed interest. "In fact, this is rather opportune. Merlin, since you have finished your research, you can assist Prince Arthur." After being sent to Camelot under the care of Geoffrey of Monmouth, Merlin spends his first few weeks working in the royal library. It seems like the perfect place to hide away from the tyrannical, magic-hating King Uther—until Prince Arthur comes barging into Merlin's life. Turns out it's not so easy to escape destiny's hand.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: When Magic meets the modern day, chaos ensues
entry.summary:
Author: Music_girl2024

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,633Chapters: 6/22Kudos: 23

Summary: Merlin shouldn’t have turned himself into a tree…1500 years ago it seemed like a smart idea - wait out the years until Arthur’s return as part of nature, without having to interact with anyone. He wasn’t expecting the lake to expand and for his tree to end up in the shallows. Nor was he expecting to be spat out randomly on what he assumed to be an ordinary sunset. Now he’s stuck in the middle of a lake, a recently resurrected Arthur Pendragon in his arms and someone is staring at them.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,900Chapters: 179/?Kudos: 152

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,523Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 49

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?" "You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: A love time stands still for
entry.summary:
Author: hysterical_light

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,605Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 67

Summary: What if no one is around when Arthur rises from the lake,what if Arthur is left to make his own way, towards the warm feeling guiding his soul.With a knights mindset in the modern world. A fairly sappy warm take on Arthur rising and finding Merlins new life in his little tudor house with his big grey cat

entry.title: Silent hill Camalot
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,177Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin's memory wakes up foggy, only to find a mysterious note from Arthur on the table: "I am waiting for you where we first met." However, when Merlin returns to Camelot, he is greeted not by a glorious kingdom, but by a blinding fog, an eerie silence, and sorrowful shadows. As he searches for his lost king, it will bring Merlin face-to-face with an irreversible tragedy. -This is a silent hill customisation. If you like the game, we will love it.

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 89,715Chapters: 19/22Kudos: 782

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: When the Sunlight Dims
entry.summary:
Author: thesugarplumfairy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,870Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: After being gone from Camelot for three years, Merlin couldn't care less about the Kingdom or it's King. When he has to go back to right a wrong, he plans to do what he must and then return home. Of course, King Arthur musn't know he's in town, which is fine because he'll only be there for a night. Right?

entry.title: Thief of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Isabella100627

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,721Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 1

Summary: No young man, no matter how great, can know his destiny. He cannot glimpse his part in the great story that is about to unfold. Like everyone, he must live and learn. And so it will be for the young warlock arriving at the gates of Camelot. A boy that will, in time, father a legend. His name... Merlin.

entry.title: I pull you in just to feel your heartbeat
entry.summary:
Author: Katiebabyangel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,702Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: It was supposed to be a nice break from the monotony of the castle. Instead, Arthur woke up trapped in a tiny cell with a worryingly unconscious manservant. Cue Arthur stressing and Merlin waking just in time to fight their way free. But will Merlin look at Arthur the same way after what he did to get them free? What's the difference between self defense and murder? Based on the prompt: “Well, this is a nice change of scenery.” “It’s a prison cell.” “I was being sarcastic.”

entry.title: Still Bound to you, I'm Bound to fall
entry.summary:
Author: KeeperOfDragons

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,151Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Neither Merlin, nor Arthur knew that this would be where they'd end up. But Arthur knew he had to protect Merlin, even if that meant protecting him from himself, from magic. Merlin would do anything for Arthur, but so would Arthur, and through that love and devotion, many lines would be crossed. Lines that leave you wondering whether you can ever come back from? Or Merlin Bingo adopted prompt: Abuse

entry.title: Firebug
entry.summary:
Author: seraknockiddy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,354Chapters: 9/14Kudos: 14

Summary: A series of mysterious fires has been terrorising the small town of Colchester for months now. Uther Pendragon, the incumbent mayor, finds this anything but amusing—especially so close to the town's bi-thousandth anniversary celebrations. Consequently, he has no choice but to call in outside help to restore peace to his beautiful town (and ensure his re-election next year).Arthur—his son and the chief of the local fire department—is far from thrilled at the prospect of being scrutinised by a conceited big-city inspector. Not that he has anything to hide, mind you; in fact, he feels he has had the situation quite well under control on his own—until another fire nearly costs one of his crew members their life...

entry.title: The Holes in Your Jeans
entry.summary:
Author: JesterJuice030

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 319Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: “So, you buy jeans that already have holes in them?” Arthur asks.“It’s a style,” Merlin says, leaning back against the pillows of Arthur’s bed, nose deep in a magazine. “You make it sound lame.”---In which Arthur doesn't understand the appeal of pre-distressed jeans, until he does.
